content: Design documents for raylib games go in games/<slug>/docs/ and include gdd.md and systems_plan.json.
Raylib game main loops should use frame time via rl.get_frame_time() for updates

name: GameSystem structure
description: Use a central GameSystem class to manage entities, scaling, and waves, separating game logic from UI drawing

content: When designing a 3D flight simulator in raylib, isolate 3D vector operations and rotation logic into a dedicated utils.py to prevent clutter in entity logic.
Raylib 3D drawing: when rendering simple objects, using rl.draw_cube and rl.draw_circle_3d without full matrix stack manipulation avoids issues and pyray errors while maintaining procedural geometry

description: Using raw tuples for colors instead of rl.Color(r,g,b,a) in raylib games causes runtime ctypes errors.
resolution: Always initialize colors with rl.Color instead of tuples in constants.

content: When defining 3D games in raylib, be careful with importing constants directly and ensure tuples are wrapped in rl.Color() to avoid type mismatch exceptions.
